tasks.subject: Task 1: Data model — update fields, status helper, event topic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add update status fields to ContainerInfo, a status-derivation helper, status constants, and the new typed event topic.

**Files:** daemon/dto/docker.go, daemon/constants/topics.go, daemon/dto/docker_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/dto/... -run TestContainerUpdate -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/docker.go", "daemon/constants/topics.go", "daemon/dto/docker_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/dto/... -run TestContainerUpdate -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ContainerInfo update fields", "status constants", "Status() tri-state", "TopicDockerUpdatesUpdate", "nil bool omitted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: DockerUpdate collector
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collector that periodically checks updates, publishes on TopicDockerUpdatesUpdate, dedupes unchanged results.

**Files:** daemon/services/collectors/docker_update.go, daemon/services/collectors/docker_update_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/collectors/... -run TestDockerUpdateCollector -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/collectors/docker_update.go", "daemon/services/collectors/docker_update_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/collectors/... -run TestDockerUpdateCollector -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Start panic recovery + ctx.Done", "checkFn injectable", "publish first, dedupe unchanged", "startup stagger"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Interval plumbing + collector registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire CLI/config/interval + register docker_update (default 6h); raise runtime interval cap to 86400.

**Files:** daemon/constants/const.go, daemon/domain/context.go, daemon/domain/fileconfig.go, main.go, daemon/services/collector_manager.go, daemon/services/collector_manager_coverage_test.go

**Verify:** go build ./... && go test ./daemon/services/ -run TestRegisterAllCollectors_IncludesDockerUpdate -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/constants/const.go", "daemon/domain/context.go", "daemon/domain/fileconfig.go", "main.go", "daemon/services/collector_manager.go", "daemon/services/collector_manager_coverage_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go test ./daemon/services/ -run TestRegisterAllCollectors_IncludesDockerUpdate -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IntervalDockerUpdate=21600", "Intervals fields", "CLI flag + validCollectorNames", "manager registers default 21600", "cap raised to 86400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Cache binding + read-time merge in GetDockerCache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cache update result and merge update status into GetDockerCache() returns (copy), keeping raw cache pure.

**Files:** daemon/services/api/cache_store.go, daemon/services/api/event_bindings.go, daemon/services/api/cache_store_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run TestGetDockerCacheMerge -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/api/cache_store.go", "daemon/services/api/event_bindings.go", "daemon/services/api/cache_store_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run TestGetDockerCacheMerge -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dockerUpdatesCache field", "binding stores result", "merge by ID, absent=unknown", "raw slice not mutated", "GetContainerUpdatesCache getter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: REST endpoints — cached /docker/updates + refresh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Serve /docker/updates from cache; add POST /docker/updates/refresh that runs+publishes a check.

**Files:** daemon/services/api/handlers.go, daemon/services/api/server.go, daemon/services/api/handlers_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run TestDockerUpdates -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/api/handlers.go", "daemon/services/api/server.go", "daemon/services/api/handlers_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run TestDockerUpdates -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /docker/updates from cache, empty when uncached", "POST refresh runs+publishes+returns", "route registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Alerting metric — ContainerUpdatesAvailable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ContainerUpdatesAvailable expr metric and populate from merged docker cache.

**Files:** daemon/dto/alert.go, daemon/services/alerting/engine.go, daemon/services/alerting/engine_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/alerting/ -run TestContainerUpdatesAvailableMetric -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/alert.go", "daemon/services/alerting/engine.go", "daemon/services/alerting/engine_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/alerting/ -run TestContainerUpdatesAvailableMetric -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AlertEnv expr field", "engine counts UpdateAvailable", "count=1 for one update"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: MCP — refresh tool + docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add refresh_container_updates MCP tool; document update_status on container listings.

**Files:** daemon/services/mcp/server.go, docs/integrations/mcp.md, daemon/services/mcp/server_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ -run TestRefreshContainerUpdates -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/mcp/server.go", "docs/integrations/mcp.md", "daemon/services/mcp/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ -run TestRefreshContainerUpdates -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tool registered+publishes", "mcp.md documents tool+update_status", "registration test updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Opt-in notification on new updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Opt-in Unraid notification when a container newly has an update (transition set only).

**Files:** daemon/domain/context.go, main.go, daemon/services/collectors/docker_update.go, daemon/services/collectors/docker_update_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/collectors/... -run TestDockerUpdateNotify -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/domain/context.go", "main.go", "daemon/services/collectors/docker_update.go", "daemon/services/collectors/docker_update_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/collectors/... -run TestDockerUpdateNotify -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DockerUpdateNotify field + CLI flag", "notify transition set only", "notifyFn injectable", "silent first run/disabled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Docs, swagger, CHANGELOG, full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CHANGELOG entry, regenerate swagger, full make test + pre-commit-run.

**Files:** CHANGELOG.md, daemon/docs/swagger.json, daemon/docs/swagger.yaml

**Verify:** make test && make pre-commit-run

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md", "daemon/docs/swagger.json", "daemon/docs/swagger.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "make test && make pre-commit-run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CHANGELOG entry", "swagger regenerated with refresh endpoint", "make test passes", "make pre-commit-run passes"]}
```
